rulings.Case Title: ELDER MARTINEZ et al VS. GLORIA C. ARGUETA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 1, 2013, line 1 - PLAINTIFF CONTARINO BARRERA's Motion for Terminating Sanctions. Plaintiff Barrera's Motion for Terminating Sanctions. Hearing Required. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: UNION BANK, N.A. VS. FRANK MYERS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 1, 2013, line 2 - CROSS DEFENDANT UNION BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT. Cross-Defendant's Demurrer to Cross-Complaint is OFF CALENDAR. Defendant to file Notice of Stay of Proceedings. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: CMR COMMERCIAL MORTGAGE FUND LLC VS. DONALD C. PIPKINS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 1, 2013, line 3 - PLAINTIFF CMR COMMERCIAL MORTGAGE FUND LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden. No opposition was field. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: CMR COMMERCIAL MORTGAGE FUND LLC VS. DONALD C. PIPKINS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 1, 2013, line 3 - CROSS DEFENDANT CMR COMMERCIAL MORTGAGE FUND LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Cross-Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment is GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden. No opposition was field. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: NANCY RYTI VS. CORYL J LASSEN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 1, 2013, line 4 - CROSS DEFENDANT NANCY RYTI and BOB KORMAN's MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT. Cross-Defendants' Motion to Strike Cross-Complaint is DENIED. Moving party failed to carry its burden to show that entire cross-complaint arises from protected activity. The only allegation the cross-complaint pointed to by moving party is "by influencing or attempting to influence Cross-Complainant to vacate by fraud, intimidation or coercion by threatening Cross-Complainant" is found in fourth cause of action, paragraph 37. Cross-complaint does not refer to any protected activity suggested by moving party. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: ERLINDA SAN JUAN VS. MICHAEL CIOFALO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 1, 2013, line 8 - DEFENDANT MICHAEL CIOFALO and EVE SEGASTURE's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Defendants' Motion fro Summary Judgment is DENIED. Improper motion for reconsideration. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT VS. PAUL K. VOU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 1, 2013, line 7 - PLAINTIFF EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is GRANTED, subject to opposition. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: NASIR PATEL VS. FREDERICK LINDSEY JR.
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 1, 2013, line 5 - DEFENDANT FREDERICK LINDSEY' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Only one Document attached to the Complaint is labeled "EXHIBIT A." =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: V.G. LIQUOR CORP. DBA 1312 UTAH HOTEL VS. JOHN SCARAMANGLIA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 1, 2013, line 10 - DEFENDANT JOHN SCRAMAGLIA's AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Non-opposition filed. Defendant's counsel shall comply with Local Rule of Court 2.6C in future. (501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: V.G. LIQUOR CORP. DBA 1312 UTAH HOTEL VS. JOHN SCARAMANGLIA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 1, 2013, line 10 - DEFENDANT JOHN SCRAMAGLIA's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Defendant's Motion to Strike Complaint is DENIED. Complaint alleges that March rent was due and payable on the first of the month, i.e. it was due in full at the time notice was served. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES VS. RONNIE LOCKETT et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 1, 2013, line 9 - DEFENDANT RONNIE LOCKETT's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment. The Court treats Defendant's motion as motion for Judgment on the Pleadings and GRANTS it with 5 day leave to amend for Plaintiff to reconcile allegations in Complaint with operative 3 Day Notice. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: BETTY ANN MORRIS VS. HAMILTON, EDWARD A/K/A EDWIN B. HAGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Deft To Respond To Interrogatories And Produce Documents, And For An Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 1, 2013, line 6 - PLAINTIFF BETTY MORRIS' Motion For Order Compelling Defendant To Respond To Interrogatories And Produce Documents, And For An Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Responses to Interrogatories is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Sanctions granted in the amount of $390. =(501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: BETTY ANN MORRIS VS. HAMILTON, EDWARD A/K/A EDWIN B. HAGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Order Deeming Admissions Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 1, 2013, line 6 - PLAINTIFF BETTY MORRIS' Motion For Order Deeming Admissions Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions. Plaintiff's Motion for an Order Deeming Requests for Admissions Admitted is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Sanctions granted in the amount of $390. =(501/EHG)
